inputDescriptor.description: Activates Voxles rendering
inputDescriptor.name: voxels

inputDescriptor.description: Adjusts the step size for traversing through voxels
inputDescriptor.name: voxelStepMultiplier

inputDescriptor.description: Modifies the step size when calculating lighting.
inputDescriptor.name: lightStepMultiplier

inputDescriptor.description: Multiplier that adjusts the brightness of the rendered background.
inputDescriptor.name: brightness

inputDescriptor.description: Multiplier that controls the intensity of the reflected environment.
inputDescriptor.name: backgroundReflectionFactor

inputDescriptor.description: Multiplier that controls the intensity of the ambient light produced by the Gradient
inputDescriptor.name: ambientIntensity

inputDescriptor.description: Controls if any Environment background is rendered.
inputDescriptor.name: displayBackground

inputDescriptor.description: Applies tonemapping and exposure to the background. When disabled, the background is rendered as-is, bypassing post-processing.
inputDescriptor.name: tonemapBackground

inputDescriptor.description: Enables the rendering of opaque geometry
inputDescriptor.name: opaque

inputDescriptor.description: Toggles rendering of transparent geometry.
inputDescriptor.name: transparent

inputDescriptor.description: Enables the use of reflection probes (deprecated. Control with Rendering→Reflection→Probes instead)
inputDescriptor.name: probes

inputDescriptor.description: Enable decal rendering.
inputDescriptor.name: decals

inputDescriptor.description: Activates selection outline effect.
inputDescriptor.name: selectionOutlines

inputDescriptor.description: Activates Point Cloud rendering
inputDescriptor.name: pointClouds

inputDescriptor.description: Swaps the shaders to use the higher quality point cloud rendering
inputDescriptor.name: highQuality

inputDescriptor.description: Controls the point cloud anti-aliasing threshold
inputDescriptor.name: hqAAThreshold

inputDescriptor.description: Activates Point Cloud rendering the light clustering visualization
inputDescriptor.name: lightClustering

inputDescriptor.description: Enables visualization of the clusters. The visualization is a heat map of cluster cell occupancy.
inputDescriptor.name: showLightClusters

inputDescriptor.description: Toggles the visualization of the first directional light shadow cascades.
inputDescriptor.name: showLightCascades

inputDescriptor.description: Toggles the scene geometry culling. The culling setting of the scene must be on for this to have effect.
inputDescriptor.name: enableGeometryCulling

inputDescriptor.description: Tint of the fog color. This will be combined with other parameters to form the final fog color.
inputDescriptor.name: fogColor

inputDescriptor.description: Rate at which light is absorbed or scattered as it passes through the fog. Each channel (RGB) can have a different rate.
inputDescriptor.name: fogExtinction

inputDescriptor.description: Rate of internal scattering within the fog. This affects how much light is scattered back towards the camera. Each channel (RGB) can have a different rate.
inputDescriptor.name: fogInterScattering

inputDescriptor.description: Density of the fog based on the distance from the camera to the point in the scene. Higher values result in denser fog.
inputDescriptor.name: fogDistanceDensity

inputDescriptor.description: Controls the fog's density based on height. A value of 0 disables height-based effects. Higher values create a sharper transition between the fogged and clear areas.
inputDescriptor.name: fogHeightDensity

inputDescriptor.description: Height at which the fog starts. Below this height, there will be no fog.
inputDescriptor.name: fogZeroHeight

inputDescriptor.description: Activates Fog effect
inputDescriptor.name: fog

inputDescriptor.description: Activates the gradient background
inputDescriptor.name: gradient

inputDescriptor.description: Activates Skybox rendering
inputDescriptor.name: skybox

inputDescriptor.description: Controls if regular skybox (value 0), radiance skybox texture (index 1), or irradiance skybox texture (value 1), will be rendered as background.
inputDescriptor.name: skyboxCubemapChoice

inputDescriptor.description: Is Skybox cubemap HDRI.
inputDescriptor.name: skyboxHDRI

inputDescriptor.description: Activates procedural atmosphere rendering
inputDescriptor.name: atmosphere

inputDescriptor.description: Controls reflections.
inputDescriptor.name: reflection

inputDescriptor.description: Enables reflections based on the scene's gradient
inputDescriptor.name: reflectGradient

inputDescriptor.description: Enables reflections of the skybox
inputDescriptor.name: reflectSkybox

inputDescriptor.description: Enables atmospheric reflections
inputDescriptor.name: reflectAtmosphere

inputDescriptor.description: Enables screen space reflections
inputDescriptor.name: reflectSSR

inputDescriptor.description: Enables reflection probes
inputDescriptor.name: reflectProbes

inputDescriptor.description: Takes the scene settings for gradient, skybox, or atmosphere
inputDescriptor.name: reflectEnvironmentSetting

inputDescriptor.description: Controls the pointer highlight effect.
inputDescriptor.name: pointerHighlight

inputDescriptor.description: Parameter sets the color tint of the highlight.
inputDescriptor.name: highlightTint

inputDescriptor.description: Parameter sets the alpha intensity of the highlight effect.
inputDescriptor.name: highlightStrength

inputDescriptor.description: Controls the horizontal grid effect.
inputDescriptor.name: grid

inputDescriptor.description: Parameters control the distance at which the grid lines that repeat every .1 units are rendered.
inputDescriptor.name: grid.1Range

inputDescriptor.description: Parameters control the distance at which the grid lines that repeat every 1 units are rendered.
inputDescriptor.name: grid1Range

inputDescriptor.description: Parameters control the distance at which the grid lines that repeat every 10 units are rendered.
inputDescriptor.name: grid10Range

inputDescriptor.description: Parameters control the distance at which the grid lines that repeat every 100 units are rendered.
inputDescriptor.name: grid100Range

inputDescriptor.description: The height of the XZ grid plane.
inputDescriptor.name: gridHeight

inputDescriptor.description: Controls if the Debug Lines will be rendered.
inputDescriptor.name: debugLines

inputDescriptor.description: Controls the distance at which the debug lines will be drawn.
inputDescriptor.name: debugFadeoutDistance

inputDescriptor.description: Controls the multiplier of the alpha value for the occluded debug lines .
inputDescriptor.name: debugOccludedAlphaMultiplier

inputDescriptor.description: Controls the minimum alpha value of the occluded lines.
inputDescriptor.name: debugMinimumAlpha

inputDescriptor.description: Activates the transparent ground plane effect.
inputDescriptor.name: transparentGroundPlane

inputDescriptor.description: Parameter sets the Y coordinate of the plane.
inputDescriptor.name: transparentGroundPlaneHeight

inputDescriptor.description: Parameter controls the intensity of the shadows cast from directional lights.
inputDescriptor.name: transparentGroundPlaneDirectionalShadowStrength

inputDescriptor.description: Mask background pixels without applying anti aliasing.
inputDescriptor.name: removeBackground

inputDescriptor.description: The color the background will be replaced with
inputDescriptor.name: removedBackgroundColor

inputDescriptor.description: Apply simple anti aliasing to the border between the world and the background
inputDescriptor.name: removedBackgroundBorderAA

inputDescriptor.description: Activates tonemapping post process effect.
inputDescriptor.name: tonemapping

inputDescriptor.description: Index that controls which tonemapping function will be applied.
inputDescriptor.name: tonemappingIndex

inputDescriptor.description: Adjusts image brightness / contrast / saturation.
inputDescriptor.name: bcs

inputDescriptor.description: Controls if SSR will be computed.
inputDescriptor.name: ssr

inputDescriptor.description: Controls how far an SSR ray will travel during ray marching.
inputDescriptor.name: maxDistance

inputDescriptor.description: Controls the maximum number of iterations when traversing the reflection ray.
inputDescriptor.name: maxSteps

inputDescriptor.description: Controls the size of the step of the ray traversal.
inputDescriptor.name: stride

inputDescriptor.description: Controls the offset that will be applied to the scene depth, that determines when raymarch will terminate.
inputDescriptor.name: zThickness

inputDescriptor.description: Activates the volumetric lighting effect.
inputDescriptor.name: volumetricLighting

inputDescriptor.description: Total number of iterations for ray traversal.
inputDescriptor.name: steps

inputDescriptor.description: Air thickness
inputDescriptor.name: density

inputDescriptor.description: The range of the effect from the camera.
inputDescriptor.name: distance

inputDescriptor.description: Activates the temporal anti-aliasing effect.
inputDescriptor.name: taa

inputDescriptor.description: A scaling factor used to modulate the amount of jitter applied to the projection matrix.
inputDescriptor.name: jitterScale

inputDescriptor.description: Enable advanced TAA if the scene does not contain animated meshes
inputDescriptor.name: TAAStaticScene

inputDescriptor.description: Activates sharpen effect.
inputDescriptor.name: sharpen

inputDescriptor.description: A parameter that controls the intensity of the sharpening effect. Ranges from 0 to 1 with higher values resulting in a more pronounced sharpening.
inputDescriptor.name: sharpenStrength

inputDescriptor.description: Is the sharpen filter edge aware.
inputDescriptor.name: sharpenEdgeAware

inputDescriptor.description: Activates the specular filtering effect.
inputDescriptor.name: filterSpecular

inputDescriptor.description: Activates the Horizon-Based Ambient Occlusion effect.
inputDescriptor.name: hbao

inputDescriptor.description: Activates the cross billateral post filtering.
inputDescriptor.name: hbaoBillateralFilter

inputDescriptor.description: Strength of the Horizon-Based Ambient Occlusion effect.
inputDescriptor.name: hbaoStrength

inputDescriptor.description: HBAO effect runs in half resolution.
inputDescriptor.name: hbaoHalfSize

inputDescriptor.description: Enable the bloom effect.
inputDescriptor.name: bloom

inputDescriptor.description: The number that will be subtracted from the color value before the bloom blur is applied.
inputDescriptor.name: bloomThreshold

inputDescriptor.description: Aa value by which the color values will be multiplied before the blurred bloom is applied.
inputDescriptor.name: bloomStrength

inputDescriptor.description: Enable the edge outlines effect.
inputDescriptor.name: edgeOutlines

inputDescriptor.description: The color of the drawn edges.
inputDescriptor.name: edgeColor

inputDescriptor.description: The intensity of the edge effect.
inputDescriptor.name: edgeStrength

inputDescriptor.description: Project the skybox onto the ground.
inputDescriptor.name: skyboxGrounded

inputDescriptor.description: The radius of the projection sphere.
inputDescriptor.name: skyboxRadius

inputDescriptor.description: The height of the projection center.
inputDescriptor.name: skyboxHeight
